name: /prompt-ab statistical mode reports both the win-rate and a confidence interval
command: mkdir -p prompts/x && printf 'name: x\n' > prompts/x/v1.0.0.md && printf 'name: x\n' > prompts/x/v1.1.0.md && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/prompt-ab.sh" x v1.0.0 v1.1.0 --eval-stub n=100,b_wins=70 --dry-run 2>out.txt && grep -qE 'win_rate_b=0.70' out.txt && grep -qE 'ci_(low|95)=' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
